scripts.build: npm --workspace @dikshant/ui run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/shared run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/types run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/main-web run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/post-web run build && npm --workspace @dikshant/api run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @dikshant/main-web run lint && npm --workspace @dikshant/post-web run lint
